notes: Pin positions are % from top-left of the layout image. Adjust x/y after walking the floor.

stations.label: Receive
stations.description: Scan fabric cut stickers when rolls arrive (Fabric Receiving).

stations.label: Wash
stations.description: Start or finish machine wash (Fabric Receiving).

stations.label: Iron
stations.description: Finish prep and hand off to cutting (Fabric Receiving).

stations.label: Cutting
stations.description: Scan piece stickers at the cutting table (Production).

stations.label: Sewing
stations.description: Scan when cutting is done — moves piece to sewing (Production).

stations.label: Finishing
stations.description: Press, trim, and final prep before packing.

stations.label: Packed
stations.description: Ready for dispatch — rack / shipping area.
